name: @workspace-todo-app/local-dev
description: Local development helpers for Rayfin apps: a Vite dev-server proxy that fronts the remote backend on a same-origin /.rayfin/ path and transparently reroutes function calls to a locally-running Azure Functions host, plus a client helper that picks the right backend base URL for dev vs production builds. Prototype of a future first-party @microsoft/rayfin-local-dev package.
